profile.name: Pawan Parida

custom_summaries.data_analytics: Data Analytics student (graduating 2026) with expertise in Python (Pandas, NumPy), SQL,  and Data Visualization. Seeking an internship to leverage skills in predictive modeling and automated reporting. Core Contributor to Google DeepMind and Kornia libraries. Proven ability to optimize data pipelines and reduce retrieval times by 95%.
custom_summaries.ai_engineer: Computer Science student specializing in Deep Learning, Differentiable Programming, and LLM Agents. Seeking an AI Engineering internship. Core Contributor to Google DeepMind (Optax, MuJoCo)  and Kornia libraries. Experienced in building low-latency AI agents (<100ms latency)  and optimizing production ML workflows.
custom_summaries.ai_dev: Final-year student specializing in AI/ML development, dataset preprocessing, and Generative AI solutions. Proven experience in cleaning/preprocessing datasets, performing EDA, and building/testing automated systems using Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib). Core contributor to Google DeepMind and Kornia libraries, leveraging Git/GitHub for version control to deliver robust production-ready code.

profile.summary: Final-year Data Analytics student seeking entry-level opportunities. Core Contributor to  Google DeepMind and Kornia. Expertise in Python, SQL, and predictive modeling.  Passionate about translating complex datasets into actionable business insights.

achievements: DSEU RIT Campus Hackthon 2025 1st place winner [Link](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/pawan-parida-60134b276_hackathon-winner-dseu-activity-7409801315503017984-Xgg0?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAENTlaEB49ZUCvBQwO0amZN6fR6q7QFHvTI)

Selected in Delhi Startup Yuva Festival 2025 - 2026 [Link](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/pawan-parida-60134b276_railflowai-visioncraft-dseu-activity-7408714159888195584-YHzT?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAENTlaEB49ZUCvBQwO0amZN6fR6q7QFHvTI)
DSEU RIT Campus Badminton 2025 2nd place winner

Processed and analyzed **2,000+ agricultural soil samples** using **Pandas** and **Jupyter Notebook**, implementing a **Decision Tree algorithm** via **scikit-learn** to optimize fertilizer ratios and reduce chemical waste by **~15%**.

Deployed a **Streamlit dashboard** ([Demo](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/pawan-parida-60134b276_machinelearning-datascience-agriculturetech-activity-7330211883410432000-NwYd?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAENTlaEB49ZUCvBQwO0amZN6fR6q7QFHvTI)) to visualize crop viability, cutting interpretation time by **40%**.
Built secure **REST APIs** and backend logic using **Fernet-encrypted payload storage** and JSON packaging for live meetings.
Developed a Gemini-powered **CaptionGen** app with robust output parsing and **Pydantic validation**.
Built a **Document Generator**, **Sentiment Analysis pipeline**, and a **CustomCanva_AI** **AI recap review system**.

projects.name: AIVOX (AI Interview Coach)
projects.description: Real-time interview coaching platform integrating AI technologies for comprehensive interview preparation.
achievements: Built **Groq/Whisper** pipeline with **<100ms** latency, integrating **MediaPipe** at **32 FPS** for visual cues.
Optimized **FastAPI** backend for high concurrency, reducing report generation times by **95%**.

projects.name: News Research & Synthesis Agent
projects.description: Autonomous Generative AI research agent using LangChain and optimized RAG pipelines for synthesizing insights from concurrent sources.
achievements: Engineered scalable **RAG pipeline** synthesizing 50+ sources with 88.3% accuracy (NDCG@5) using LLMs.
Optimized custom prompts and async workflows, reducing research time from hours to <2.1 seconds.

projects.name: Resume Classification & Analytics System
projects.description: Machine Learning classification and EDA pipeline for preprocessing, cleaning, and categorizing unstructured text datasets.
achievements: Preprocessed text datasets with **Pandas** & **NumPy**, achieving 98.45% accuracy across 25+ categories via **Scikit-learn**.
Performed EDA using **Matplotlib** to identify skill trends, saving 12+ hours/week of manual analysis.

projects.name: Automated SQL Query & Reporting System
projects.description: Generative AI Natural Language to SQL engine and data reporting interface for instant data access.
achievements: Engineered Text-to-SQL engine with **Gemini LLM**, achieving 91.2% accuracy across complex schemas.
Used **Streamlit** & **Pandas** to visualize reporting, reducing generation from 10 minutes to <1 second across 500+ queries.

projects.name: Pneumonia Detection
projects.description: CNN-based medical diagnostic system for pneumonia detection from chest X-rays.
achievements: Trained and optimized a **CNN** on chest X-rays, achieving 91.3% validation accuracy and minimizing false negatives.
Deployed the final model via **FastAPI** for low-latency, real-time inference.

projects.name: Healthcare Chatbot
projects.description: Context-aware medical assistant using vector search and generative AI.
achievements: Implemented RAG architecture with Pinecone vector database, achieving <100ms semantic search latency.
Integrated Gemini for context-aware medical Q&A with verified knowledge sources.

projects.name: Crop and Fertilizer Predictive Analytics
projects.description: Predictive Machine Learning model and visualization system for optimal crop and fertilizer selection.
achievements: Preprocessed 2,000+ soil samples using **Pandas** & **NumPy** to prepare features for training.
Developed **Scikit-learn** Decision Tree models (99.7% accuracy), reducing chemical waste by ~15%.
Conducted EDA and deployed interactive dashboards to visualize agricultural soil insights.

projects.name: Spam Detection using BERT
projects.description: Robust spam classifier using BERT transformers.
achievements: Fine-tuned pre-trained **BERT transformers** for spam classification, achieving **97.7% Accuracy** on text datasets.
Achieved **0% False Positives** through threshold optimization, ensuring critical communications are never blocked.

projects.name: Handwritten Digit Classification
projects.description: Deep learning model to classify handwritten digits using the MNIST dataset.
achievements: Implemented a high-performance **MLP** in **Keras**, achieving **98.2% test accuracy** on the standard MNIST dataset.
Designed custom neural network architectures and performed hyperparameter tuning to optimize model convergence.

projects.name: Railflow
projects.description: Intelligent Decision Support System for Indian Railways train scheduling.
achievements: Optimized scheduling logic using **RL** and Operations Research, reducing scheduling computation times to **<50ms**.
Developed a simulated **Digital Twin environment** for Indian Railways to model train operations and delay patterns.

projects.name: Portfolio
projects.description: Personal portfolio website showcasing Data Science and AI/ML projects.
achievements: Designed and deployed a responsive, dark-mode enabled personal portfolio website using **TailwindCSS** and **DaisyUI**.

projects.name: Issuedesk Bot
achievements: **Multi-Organization Monitoring**: Track issues across multiple GitHub organizations
**Rule-Based Filtering**: Define custom rules to filter and categorize issues
**Telegram Notifications**: Send issue alerts to Telegram topics with emoji labels

projects.name: Lovable Clone
achievements: Python 3.11 or higher
[uv](https://github.com/astral-sh/uv) (Python package manager)
Docker (optional, for containerized deployment)

projects.name: Portfolio Neo
achievements: [@vitejs/plugin-react](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react) uses [Babel](https://babeljs.io/) (or [oxc](https://oxc.rs) when used in [rolldown-vite](https://vite.dev/guide/rolldown)) for Fast Refresh
[@vitejs/plugin-react-swc](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react-swc) uses [SWC](https://swc.rs/) for Fast Refresh

projects.name: Mockout
achievements: **Subject Coverage**: Questions from Computer Science, Mathematics, and Logical Reasoning.
**Randomized Questions**:
36 Computer Science questions
